results.name: 0550-DATEPARM-READ
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN03C.cbl
Program: CBTRN03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Print the transaction detail report.
Paragraph: 0550-DATEPARM-READ (lines 220-247)
References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 0550-DATEPARM-READ in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: Read the date parameter file..
results.content:
0550-DATEPARM-READ.                                                      
           READ DATE-PARMS-FILE INTO WS-DATEPARM-RECORD                         
           EVALUATE DATEPARM-STATUS                                             
             WHEN '00'                                                          
                 MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                          
             WHEN '10'                                                          
                 MOVE 16 TO APPL-RESULT                                         
             WHEN OTHER                                                         
                 MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                         
           END-EVALUATE                                                         
                                                                                
           IF APPL-AOK                                                          
              DISPLAY 'Reporting from ' WS-START-DATE                           
                 ' to ' WS-END-DATE                                             
           ELSE                                                                 
              IF APPL-EOF                                                       
                 MOVE 'Y' TO END-OF-FILE                                        
              ELSE                                                              
                 DISPLAY 'ERROR READING DATEPARM FILE'                          
                 MOVE DATEPARM-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                              
                 PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                 
                 PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                     
              END-IF                                                            
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
      *****************************************************************         
      * I/O ROUTINES TO ACCESS A KSDS, VSAM DATA SET...               *         
      *****************************************************************

           MOVE FUNCTION CURRENT-DATE  TO WS-CURDATE-DATA

           MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COTRN1AO
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COTRN1AO
           MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COTRN1AO
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COTRN1AO

           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MONTH       TO WS-CURDATE-MM
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-DAY         TO WS-CURDATE-DD
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-YEAR(3:2)   TO WS-CURDATE-YY

           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COTRN1AO

           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HOURS       TO WS-CURTIME-HH
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-MINUTE      TO WS-CURTIME-MM
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-SECOND      TO WS-CURTIME-SS

           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COTRN1AO.

      *                      READ-TRANSACT-FILE
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 0500-DATEPARM-OPEN
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN03C.cbl
Program: CBTRN03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Print the transaction detail report.
Paragraph: 0500-DATEPARM-OPEN (lines 466-483)
References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 0500-DATEPARM-OPEN in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
0500-DATEPARM-OPEN.                                                      
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           OPEN INPUT DATE-PARMS-FILE                                           
           IF  DATEPARM-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING DATE PARM FILE'                           
               MOVE DATEPARM-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
